Apply
Applications for the next Data4All High School Bridge Workshop in Spring 2026 are now closed.
Data4all is a paid workshop created to introduce Chicago high school students to data science research and inspire them to consider careers in data science and AI. Students who successfully complete the program will receive a stipend.
Data4All Spring 2026 Schedule
Saturdays, March 28 – May 16, 2026
10:30 am – 2:30 pm. Lunch is provided.
University of Chicago Data Science Institute 5460 S. University Ave Chicago, IL 60615
Note: This is an in-person program on Saturdays on the UChicago campus in Hyde Park. Availability to attend all 8 sessions is required for student eligibility. There is no virtual option.

# Apply
#### Applications for the next Data4All High School Bridge Workshop in Spring 2026 are now closed.
Data4all is a paid workshop created to introduce Chicago high school students to data science research and inspire them to consider careers in data science and AI. Students who successfully complete the program will receive a stipend.
#### Data4All Spring 2026 Schedule
Saturdays, March 28 – May 16, 2026
10:30 am – 2:30 pm. Lunch is provided.
University of Chicago Data Science Institute 5460 S. University Ave Chicago, IL 60615
Note: This is an in-person program on Saturdays on the UChicago campus in Hyde Park. Availability to attend all 8 sessions is required for student eligibility. There is no virtual option.
